title: India News | VHP Welcomes Indore HC Verdict on Bhojshala; Calls for Restoration of Ancient University and Return of Vagdevi Idol
description: Get latest articles and stories on India at LatestLY. Vishwa Hindu Parishad (VHP) Central President Alok Kumar has hailed the Indore High Court's decision regarding the Bhojshala dispute as a "historic and well-considered" judgment.

title: Ancient artifacts found beneath Cape Canaveral Space Force Station as one mystery still stumps researchers
description: Florida students dig up ancient Native American meals at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, finding shark remains, pottery and conch shell hammers.

title: Aryavart Ancient Academy shines in CBSE Class 12 Science Exams; Biswaranjan Jujharsingh emerges as state topper
description: Bhubaneswar: Aryavart Ancient Academy has added another proud milestone to its academic journey as its student Biswaranjan Jujharsingh emerged as the state topper in CBSE Class 12 Science 2026, securing an outstanding 99%. Biswaranjan, son of Raghunath Jujharsingh and Reenarani Jujharsingh, appeared the examination under Roll Number 12629508 and delivered exceptional performance across all subjects. Biswaranjan’s Subject-wise Performance English – 75/80 Mathematics – 79/80 Physics – 66/70 Chemistry – 70/70 Computer Science – 70/70 Painting – 30/30 Full Marks in Practical / Internal Assessment / Project This remarkable achievement has positioned Aryavart Ancient Academy among the top schools in Bhubaneswar and one of the best CBSE schools in Khordha, Odisha for academic excellence and student performance. The result further strengthens the institution’s reputation as one of the good CBSE schools in Bhubaneswar and a preferred destination for students aiming for strong academic growth in Science education. Over the years, Aryavart Ancient Academy has consistently focused on quality education, disciplined learning, competitive preparation, and holistic student development. The school’s student-centric approach, experienced faculty, and academic mentorship continue to produce outstanding results in board examinations. With achievements like this, the institution is steadily emerging among the best schools in Bhubaneswar CBSE category and is being recognised as one of the Top 10 CBSE schools in Bhubaneswar by parents and students seeking excellence in education. The entire Aryavart Ancient Academy family congratulated Biswaranjan on this extraordinary accomplishment and wished him success for his future academic journey.

title: Super rare ancient coins discovered in Essex land
description: Two more ancient coins have been discovered at the original site of the Great Baddow Hoard, Essex.
